description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
We’ve fixed an issue where some users were repeatedly asked to re-authorize their Office 365 accounts. Sorry for the inconvenience this may have caused.
Please install the update and let us know if everything works as expected.
If you have any questions or feedback, contact us at support@sparkmailapp.com.

P.S. If you encounter any issues with the automatic update, please use the following link to download the update manually:
https://downloads.sparkmailapp.com/Spark3/win/dist/3.24.5.112809/Spark.exe
